Sequence similarities: SIMILARITY: Belongs to the methyltransferase OleY/MycE family. {ECO:0000305}.
Catalytic activity: CATALYTIC ACTIVITY: Reaction=mycinamicin VI + S-adenosyl-L-methionine = mycinamicin III + S-adenosyl-L-homocysteine + H(+); Xref=Rhea:RHEA:31643, ChEBI:CHEBI:15378, ChEBI:CHEBI:57856, ChEBI:CHEBI:59789, ChEBI:CHEBI:63308, ChEBI:CHEBI:63311; EC=2.1.1.238; Evidence={ECO:0000269|PubMed:19415708, ECO:0000269|PubMed:21884704};
Function [CC]: FUNCTION: O-methyltransferase that catalyzes the conversion of mycinamicin VI to mycinamicin III in the biosynthesis of mycinamicin, a 16-membered macrolide antibiotic. {ECO:0000269|PubMed:19415708, ECO:0000269|PubMed:21884704}.
